system.description:
Astropaths only. Prerequisites: Soul-bound to the Emperor.

The psyker can send and receive messages across vast distances using the warp as a medium. Requires careful concentration and meditation — cannot be done on the move or during combat. Transmitting a message normally takes 1d5 hours. Signal strength is determined by Psy Rating (see Astrotelepathic Signals table).

Focus Power Test: Willpower (difficulty varies by distance)

XP Cost: Free (Astropaths only)
